ee:transform.doc:name: Empty FHIR Bundle (no code search in CareStack)
Empty FHIR Bundle (no allergy data in CareStack dental PMS)

ee:message.ee:set-payload: #[output application/json --- { resourceType: "Bundle", "type": "searchset", total: 0, entry: [], _note: "CareStack is a dental PMS — allergy data is typically maintained in the patient's medical EHR, not the dental practice management system." }]
